titleStmt.title: SII 30.249: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 249. (A.R. No. 600 of 1915.) Vaḷḷiyūr, Nanguneri Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Subrahmaṇya temple-on the east wall of the maṇḍapa Kulasēkhara-Pāṇḍya, ‘who was pleased to take all countries’: Year 47, Āvaṇi: 1315 A.D.

summary.p: Records an undertaking given by the Śivabrāhmaṇās who received seventy varāhaṉ paṇam from an individual for their needs. They agreed to feed Tirukkaivēlaḻagiyār, a hymnist for reciting sacred hymns at the bed chamber of the god. One Vīrapāṇḍya bhaṭṭaṉ figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulace
karatevaṟku yāṇṭu 47 vatu Āva
ṇimāta nāṭāṟṟupokku Aḷḷiyū
rāṉa keraḷakula catrurvedimaṅkala
ttu tirumalai kāttaperumāḷ
koyilil civabrāhmaṇarom kiḻira
ṇiya muṭṭattu tu tāraṉ
cakara lūr Aḷakiyaṉ titama
varkku piramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta pari
cāvatu Ivar pakkal Eṅkaḷ viniyokat
tukku vāṅkiṉa varākaṉ paṇam Eḻupatuk
kum Ikkoyil nāyaṉār tiruppaḷḷi Aṟaiyi
l tiruppāṭṭu keṭṭaruḷa tiruppāṭṭu Ōtu
m tirumeṉikaḷil tirukkaivelaḻakiyārkku Innāḷ muta
l nāḷ Oṉṟukku Irunāḻi Arici coṟu
�kaRead- coṟākapiramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttu kallilu
m veṭṭik koḷvatākavum Ittirukkai
velaḻakiyār pūlokaprāpti paṇ
ṇukaiyāl I Aturavicai
cantirātit
viṟṟukkuṭuttom
pirāmaṇarom Iccoṟu Irunāḻiyum
vīrapāṇṭiya paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.249 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
